titleStmt.title: SII 8.300: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 300. (A.R. No. 27-A of 1903). ON THE SIDE OF THE WEST VERANDAH IN THE FIRST PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4.vatu tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampalaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu cittirameḻiviṇṇakar
Emperumāṉ tirumuṟṟattu śrīpaṇṭārattārkku koḻiyūrpaṟṟu capaiyārum nāṭṭāromum pukaḻttuṇaimaṅkalamāṉa viracoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu
Erikiḻ viḷainilattu Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilam muṉṟumāvum vaṭapiṭākai miṉavanallūr Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa maranilai
puṉceynila muṉṟumāvum Āka naṉcey puṉcey nilam Āṟumā meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturtdhiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urohiṇi nāḷ miḻa
laikkūṟṟattu Irumpārnāṭṭu Āṇikkuṭiyil colaimalai cokkarcokkaṉāṉa teṇṭaimāṉār Eṟiaruḷap paṇṇiṉa nācciyār Uṭai
yapirāṭṭiyār tirukkalliyāṇattu Ivarkku Amutupaṭikkum tiruviḷakkukkum Iṟaiyiliyāka tirukkaimalarile nirvārttuk kuṭuttamaiyil Innilaṅkaḷāl
vantakaṭamai kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṭṭukke paramāvatu Innaṉcey puṉ ceynilam Āṟumāvum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikkum tiruviḷakkukku
m Uṭalāka mutalaṭaṅka IṟaiIliyākat tantom . Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatu . capaiyārum nāṭṭārum
paṇikka periyanāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 8.300 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
